sections.paragraph:
ἔφοδος1 (ἔφ-οδος, ον)

accessible, Thuc.

ἔφοδος2 (ἔφ-οδος, ὁ,)

one who goes the rounds, Xen.

ἔφοδος3 (ἔφ-οδος, ἡ,)

I. a way towards, approach, Thuc., Xen.:— access for traffic and intercourse, communication, παρ' ἀλλήλους Thuc.

2. importation, Xen.

II. an onset, attack, assault, Aesch., Thuc., etc.
